quizzes.title: General Knowledge
quizzes.description: A quick mixed quiz covering geography, history, and science.

questions.question: Capital of India?
questions.explanation: Delhi is the capital city of India.

questions.question: Which planet is known as the Red Planet?
questions.explanation: Mars appears red due to iron oxide on its surface.

questions.question: Who wrote the play Hamlet?
questions.explanation: Hamlet is one of Shakespeare's most famous tragedies.

questions.question: What gas do plants absorb from the atmosphere?
questions.explanation: Plants absorb carbon dioxide during photosynthesis.

questions.question: Which ocean is the largest?
questions.explanation: The Pacific Ocean covers more area than any other ocean.

quizzes.title: Web Development Basics
quizzes.description: Test your frontend fundamentals in this timed challenge.

questions.question: What does HTML stand for?
questions.explanation: HTML stands for HyperText Markup Language.

questions.question: Which CSS property controls text size?
questions.explanation: The font-size property changes the size of text.

questions.question: Which hook is used for side effects in React?
questions.explanation: useEffect handles side effects like fetching and subscriptions.

questions.question: TypeScript is a superset of which language?
questions.explanation: TypeScript adds static types on top of JavaScript.

questions.question: Which command starts a Vite development server?
questions.explanation: Vite projects typically run in dev mode via npm run dev.
